quiescence.command_kind: docker stop with 30-second grace period over the exact 37 running container IDs

auto_removed_container.name: nuclio-local-storage-reader
auto_removed_container.reason: The container's own AutoRemove lifecycle removed it after a normal stop. No docker rm or compose down command was issued.
auto_removed_container.required_recovery_check: Verify the Nuclio/CVAT control path recreates the helper or recreate it from the governed Nuclio definition before granting the SAM2 interactor pass.

desktop_stop.vhd_exclusive_error: The process cannot access docker_data.vhdx because it is being used by another process.
desktop_stop.safety_decision: No copy was attempted because the VHD did not pass the exclusive-handle gate even though Get-DiskImage reported it detached.

official_error_log: c:\windows\system32\wsl.exe -l -v --all failed: exit status 1 (stdout empty, stderr empty)

host_control_state.reason_for_no_service_restart: Restarting WslService/vmcompute requires elevation and would re-enter the privileged PowerShell/UAC path associated with the prior laptop crash report.

required_recovery: NEEDS KEVIN: Save any unrelated open work and perform a normal Windows Restart. Do not use a forced power-off.
After login, allow Docker Desktop to reach running state before opening CVAT or launching model jobs.
Verify docker desktop status is running and docker version returns the server version.
Verify all 38 persistent containers recover according to their original restart/Compose intent.
Verify or recreate nuclio-local-storage-reader from the governed Nuclio/CVAT definition; do not invent a replacement command.
Recompute container/image/volume/network/mount inventory hashes and run CVAT API, SAM2 interactor, WSL/CUDA, model-smoke, and MaskFactory doctor checks.
Do not resume VHD backup or relocation until Docker Desktop can stop cleanly and docker_data.vhdx accepts an exclusive read handle.
